contact.title: I would love to answer your questions or help you with your problems
contact.subtitle: I’m happy to answer your inquiries or help solve your issue through direct contact or email.
contact.supportDesc: Reach out for active platform issues, workspace account lockouts, or video processing glitches.
contact.generalDesc: Drop us a line regarding bulk workspace upgrades, enterprise discussions, or media collaborations.
contact.slaDesc: We read every engineer ticket manually. Our response rate hovers between standard operational timelines.
contact.directLineDesc: We are available on WhatsApp to answer your questions and help you with your workspace.
contact.introBody: theRec.site is operated by an independent product team based in Alexandria, Egypt. Whether you need help with a failed upload, workspace access, or partnership questions, use the channel that fits your request. We read every message and aim to respond within one to two business days.
contact.businessBody: theRec.site is an independently operated SaaS platform for browser-based screen recording, video hosting, sharing, and async collaboration. For data practices, see our Privacy Policy. For subscriptions and refunds, see our Terms and Conditions and Refund Policy. For copyright and abuse reports, see our Copyright Policy and Abuse Reporting Policy.
contact.trust1: Published privacy, terms, refund, copyright, and abuse policies
contact.trust2: Human-reviewed support — no outsourced ticket black holes
contact.trust3: Independent platform focused on practical screen recording workflows

eeat.publisherBio: I write practical guides on async video, screen recording, and secure collaboration based on real product workflows on theRec.site. Content is reviewed for accuracy against the live platform before publication.
eeat.aboutTeamBody: theRec.site is independently developed and operated with attention to everyday usability. Product decisions aim to reduce friction and speed up sharing — without:
eeat.expertise1: Browser-based screen capture and multipart video upload
eeat.expertise2: Workspace permissions and secure link sharing
eeat.expertise3: Async communication workflows for remote and hybrid teams

about.title: About theRec.site
about.subtitle: An independently developed and operated software platform for screen recording, video sharing, and async collaboration.
about.transparencyBody: TheRec.site is an independently developed and operated software platform created by its founder. The service is built and maintained as an independent software project focused on screen recording, video sharing, and asynchronous collaboration. While not operated by a large corporation, the platform is committed to maintaining professional standards for reliability, security, privacy, and customer support.
about.transparencyNote: theRec.site is not operated by a corporation or large organization. The platform was created, developed, and is maintained by an independent software developer. It is not a marketplace, social network, or public content hosting service — its primary purpose is private screen recording, controlled video sharing, and team collaboration.
about.commitment1: Reliable browser-based recording and video hosting
about.commitment2: Respect for user privacy and workspace security
about.whyIntro: The idea for theRec.site came while working on college projects and sharing feedback and walkthroughs with classmates. I needed an easy, fast way to record my screen and share information without extra steps or hassle.
about.whyProblemLead: But most tools out there fell into one of these traps:
about.whyProblem1: More complex than they needed to be
about.whyProblem2: Built for large companies and huge teams
about.whyProblem3: Or charging steep subscriptions for basic features
about.whyConclusion: So I set out to build something simpler, lighter, and more practical — a platform anyone can pick up without a long learning curve or a confusing trial.
about.focus1: Fast screen recording straight from the browser
about.focus2: Easy link sharing for videos and walkthroughs
about.focus3: A simple experience without unnecessary clutter
about.focus4: Clean workspaces to organize content and collaborate
about.focus5: Automatic high-quality video processing and hosting
about.focusGoal: The goal was never to build a massive platform packed with features nobody needs. It was to build a reliable tool that helps people communicate and explain ideas faster and more easily.
about.independentBody: Every feature and policy decision is aimed at helping individuals and teams communicate faster — with professional standards for security and support, without corporate complexity.
about.independentLead: Every product decision is aimed at reducing friction and speeding up sharing — without:
about.audienceClosing: And anyone who needs a practical way to show what's on their screen
about.evolutionBody: The platform keeps evolving based on real use and practical feedback, with simplicity and speed always front and center.
about.closingThanks: Thanks for being part of the journey 🤍
about.editorialNote: This page is maintained by the founder behind theRec.site. I share how the product is built, who it serves, and how we make decisions as an independent platform.

demo.tour: 60-second tour of recording, processing, and sharing.
demo.noVideoTag: Your browser does not support the video tag.
demo.initBody: Launch recording sessions instantaneously without extension overhead. The browser pipeline catches high-definition frames and local hardware audio configurations with zero configuration delay.
demo.encodingBody: The moment you click complete, your recording asset passes into optimized rendering blocks on our backend. Thumbnails are automatically generated while streams adapt seamlessly for cross-device playback.
demo.distributionBody: Organize videos inside isolated, shareable workspaces. Your secure share token is copied directly to your clipboard automatically, reducing your communication loop down to a single click.
demo.ctaBody: Create your first asset in seconds. No credit cards, no heavy installations. Just clear, friction-free async engineering updates.
demo.title: Platform Demo
demo.subtitle: See how theRec works end to end.
demo.ctaDesc: Create your first asset in seconds. No credit cards, no heavy installations. Just clear, friction-free async engineering updates.

howItWorks.pageTitle: How Screen Recording Works on theRec
howItWorks.pageSubtitle: A complete workflow from browser capture to secure sharing — designed for async teams.
howItWorks.introBody: theRec.site removes desktop installs and long upload waits. You record from Chrome, Edge, or Firefox, your video uploads in secure segments, our cloud prepares playback and thumbnails, and you share a link or invite teammates into a workspace. The steps below reflect the exact flow you will see in the product.
howItWorks.step1Top: Open the recorder in your browser.
howItWorks.step1Bottom: Choose screen, window, or tab with optional camera and mic.
howItWorks.step2Top: Your recording uploads securely in the background.
howItWorks.componentSubtitle: Record, process, and share in minutes
howItWorks.subscriptionDesc: Upgrade and manage your workspace easily

subscriptionFlow.subtitle: A seamless billing and subscription experience designed for teams, creators, and businesses using theRec platform.

01.title: Current Subscription
01.desc: After logging into the platform, the user navigates to the Billing page from the dashboard sidebar. The current workspace subscription details, billing cycle, active plan, and subscription history are displayed here.

02.title: Choose a Plan
02.desc: The user can click “Change your plan” or upgrade to another plan. A pricing page is displayed with all available plans alongside monthly and yearly billing options for easy comparison.

03.title: Confirm Subscription
03.desc: After selecting a plan, the user is redirected to a confirmation page where recurring billing authorization and agreement to the terms and conditions must be accepted before continuing.

04.title: Enter Billing Information
04.desc: A billing popup or dialog appears requesting customer billing information such as name, email, country, city, address, and optional promo code before proceeding.

05.title: Final Review & Payment
05.desc: The final checkout review page displays the selected subscription plan, billing cycle, and payment summary. Clicking “Continue to Payment” redirects the user to Checkout review  where the payment is securely completed.
